welcome.title: Nägels
welcome.tagline: Read the table. Break the plan.
welcome.heroTitle:
A classic trick-taking card game,
built for friends.
welcome.heroSubtitle: Play with bots in seconds, or spin up a private room and share the link.
welcome.feature1: No download — works in any browser
welcome.feature2: EN / RU / ES with full translations
welcome.feature3: Stake the table by sharing one link

primer.swipeHint: Swipe left or right to navigate

screen1.title: How it works
screen1.description: Everyone plays one card at a time. The highest card wins the pile — that's a trick. All tricks in one deal = one hand. Hands go 10 cards → 1 card → 10 cards.

screen2.title: Trump beats all
screen2.description: Before each hand, say how many tricks you'll win. Hit your number exactly → +10 bonus points! One suit is «trump» — those cards beat every other suit.

screen3.title: Nail the number, win the game
screen3.description: Win too many tricks or too few — no bonus. Win exactly what you predicted — score big. The player with the most points at the end wins.

game.leaveBotGameConfirm: Leave this game? Your progress will be lost.

auth.oneGameLeft: You can play 1 game. Confirm your email for unlimited access.

auth.saveProgressDesc: Sign in to keep your stats, friends, and history across devices.
auth.savePromptAfterGameBody: Want to save your progress? Sign in to keep your stats and history across devices.
auth.savePromptBeforeCreateBody: Sign in so friends can recognize you across devices, and your stats follow you.
auth.collisionBody: This Google account is already linked to a different Nägels profile. Local guest data on this device will be replaced.

spectator.tooMany: This room already has the maximum of 10 spectators.
spectator.cannotJoinAsPlayerAndSpectator: You're already a player in this room.
spectator.title: Watching

gameMode.skipOnesHint: Middle of the ladder stays at 2 cards

multiplayer.hostLeftBody: The host left the room before the game started.
multiplayer.tooManyRooms: You've created too many rooms in the past hour. Try again later.
multiplayer.enterCodeFromHost: Ask the host for the 6-character room code
multiplayer.readyToPlayHint: Press the button below to confirm you're ready to play
multiplayer.leaveConfirmBody:
The game can't continue without you. Everyone goes back to the waiting room and your hand is dropped — the host can restart with the remaining players.

If you just need to step away or refresh — close the tab instead. You'll come back to the same seat.
multiplayer.endGameConfirmBody:
This closes the room for everyone. Everyone returns to the lobby and the room is gone for good.

If you just need to step away — close the tab instead. You'll come back to the same room.
multiplayer.leaveRoomConfirmBody: You'll go back to the lobby. The room stays open — you can rejoin from the invite link if it's still there.
multiplayer.leaveRoomHostConfirmBody: You're the host. Leaving closes the room for everyone — players go back to the lobby and the room is gone.

pwa.title: Add Nägels to your home screen
pwa.subtitle: Faster launch, push notifications when it's your turn, and proper full-screen play.
pwa.iosBody:
Safari can't install apps on its own — you'll do it from Safari's toolbar:

1. Tap the Share icon ⬆️ at the bottom of Safari
2. Scroll down and pick "Add to Home Screen"
3. Tap "Add"
pwa.androidBody: Tap Install below to add Nägels to your home screen.
pwa.androidNoPromptBody: Open your browser menu (⋮ in the top corner) and tap "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen".
pwa.alreadyInstalled: Already installed — open Nägels from your home screen.
pwa.inAppHint: If you're reading this in Telegram or another app's browser, open the link in Safari or Chrome to install.
pwa.settingsDesc: Add Nägels to your home screen for faster access and push notifications.

stakes.title: Rating stakes
stakes.guestHint: Sign in to play for rating
stakes.unconfirmedHint: Confirm your email to play for rating

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDesc: Choose light, dark, or match your device settings.
settings.deckDesc: Classic uses red/black. Four-color gives each suit a unique color.
settings.notificationsDesc: Wake me when it is my turn or the game starts.
settings.notificationsDenied: Enable notifications in your browser site settings, then come back.
settings.notificationsPwa: Add this site to your home screen first (Share → Add to Home Screen).
settings.notificationsUnsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.

onboarding.biddingBody:
Predict how many tricks you will win this hand. Exact match = +10 bonus. Missing it means no bonus — but you still earn one point per trick taken.

The last bidder cannot make the total of all bids equal the cards dealt — someone has to stay unhappy.
onboarding.trumpRankBody: In the trump suit, the Jack is the highest card and the 9 is the second highest. So J♥ and 9♥ beat A♥ when hearts are trump.
onboarding.noTrumpBody: This round has no trump suit. The highest card of the lead suit always wins. Trumps return next round.
onboarding.scoringBody:
Each trick won = 1 point.
Exact bid = +10 bonus.
Miss your bid = no bonus.

Highest total after all hands wins.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.subtitle: Spotted a bug or have an idea? Let us know.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What happened, or what would you like to see?
feedback.errorEmpty: Please write a message before sending.
feedback.errorOffline: Can't reach the server right now. Try again later.
feedback.errorGeneric: Couldn't send feedback. Please try again.
feedback.successMessage: Thanks! Your feedback has been sent.
